title: Herbal Quinoa Salad with Sous-Vide
description: A light and herbal Portuguese-inspired salad featuring quinoa, mixed greens, and a delicate dressing that includes granulated sugar for a unique twist.

ingredients.name: quinoa
ingredients.notes: rinsed and cooked according to package instructions

ingredients.name: mixed greens
ingredients.notes: includes lettuce, spinach, and arugula for freshness and texture

ingredients.name: lemon juice
ingredients.notes: freshly squeezed from one lemon for brightness

ingredients.name: apple cider vinegar
ingredients.notes: reduces the acidity of the lemon to make it more suitable for a salad dressing

ingredients.name: olive oil
ingredients.notes: used as the primary fat in this dressing

ingredients.name: granulated sugar
ingredients.notes: adds sweetness and balances the tanginess of the dressing

ingredients.name: sauces, mixed (e.g., soy sauce)
ingredients.notes: used for a touch of umami and extra flavor

instructions: Sous-vide the quinoa according to package instructions at 50°C (122°F) for about 3 hours or until it's soft.
Prepare other ingredients like mixed greens, grated ginger root, and mix-ins such as chopped nuts and seeds for added texture.
In a mixing bowl, combine the cooked quinoa with all other prepared ingredients and dressings. Mix gently but thoroughly to ensure everything is evenly coated.
Taste the salad dressing; if needed, adjust it with more lemon juice or apple cider vinegar for better balance of flavors.
